mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_t (username, email, password, phone) VALUES (#{username}, #{email}, #{password}, #{phone})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM member_t WHERE email = #{email} AND active = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_t WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_t WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.update: UPDATE member_t SET active = 1 WHERE m_idx = #{m_idx}
